name: Crookes Brothers Limited
summary: Crookes Brothers Limited, together with its subsidiaries, produces agricultural products. The company offers sugar cane, bananas, deciduous fruits, and macadamias. It is also involved in the development and sale of commercial, residential, and industrial real estate properties. In addition, the company engages in the sale of grains and nursery plants, and rental of leased buildings, as well as tourism business. It has operations in the KwaZulu-Natal, Mpumalanga, and Western Cape provinces of South Africa, as well as in Swaziland, Zambia, and Mozambique. The company was founded in 1860 and is headquartered in Mount Edgecombe, South Africa.
